title: Autoblaster
content:
{{Top|canon=Auto-blaster}}
[[File:Autoblaster-XWMBW.png|thumb|right|250px|A B-wing autoblaster firing]]
The '''autoblaster''' was a type of [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]].<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> They were rapid-fire cannons, fitted with advanced [[XCiter/Legends|XCiters]] and specialized [[Actuating module/Legends|actuating modules]]. The weapons were capable of high cyclical rates of fire with each pull of the trigger or push of the button, releasing hails of [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolts at a target.<ref name="EotE-CR">[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Edge of the Empire'' Core Rulebook]]</ref> By the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], autoblasters were considered to be archaic weapons.<ref name="SH">[[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']]</ref>

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] was armed with autoblasters mounted under the nose of its [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]].<ref name="EGVV">''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref> [[Ugor/Legends|Ugor]] [[Black Hole-class Salvage Dreadnought|''Black Hole''-class Salvage Dreadnought]] were armed with scavenged autoblasters.<ref name="SH" /> The [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] was armed with a hidden autoblaster for ground defense.<ref name="EGWT" />

{{Weapon-stub}}
